name: getNextCANdbName
title: getNextCANdbName
syntax: dword getNextCANdbName( dword pos, char buffer[], dword size)
description: Finds out the names of the other assigned databases with pos.

parameters.name: pos
parameters.description: Position number of the database to be found.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer in which the database name is written.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in Byte.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
